channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 13th May
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please relay x1 raised 900x600x30 mm slab number 1 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 13th May
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference please ramp up over tree roots 1200x1500x30mm stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 13th May
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please replace x1 broken rocking sunken x1 900x600x20 mm slab number 1 (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 13th May
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 13th May
item.description:

item.title: Pothole formed on the road next to the pavement, 13th May
item.description:
Outside of 64 Abbots Leys Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbots Leys Road, Winchcombe, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface problem, 13th May
item.description:
Customer reports that the grill in the pavement at the location is unstable. Furthermore, the concrete surround is breaking up and they fear that it may collapse imminently. They ask that this is investigated asap.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 13th May
item.description:
Reset broken cover and frame 600mm x 600mm x 100mm Give and take TM ///bound.glare.lively (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet
